arts.ttl: “I gave everything, we gave everything” — Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller says squad did not lack fight vs. Inter Milan
arts.sum: Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich 2-2 draw with Inter Milan in the Champions League that saw the Bavarians eliminated from the competition on an aggregate score of 4-3? Thomas Müller final Champions League match with Inter Milan did not go as planned for the Bavarians.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan star speaks out after ending Harry Kane's Champions League dream
arts.sum: Inter Milan, beaten by Manchester City in the 2023 Champions League Final, will face Barcelona in the final four as the Italians continue their pursuit of the treble

arts.ttl: “He fought until the last minute” — Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany praises Thomas Müller after Champions League elimination
arts.sum: Thomas Müller started and played the full 90 minutes, captaining Bayern Munich in what will likely be his last Champions League match with the club. Most will agree that it would have been the perfect fairy tale ending to play his last match at the Allianz Arena in the Champions League Final, and to lift the European Cup for a third time.

arts.ttl: Inter setting no limits with treble dream still alive
arts.sum: With a treble still on the cards, Inter Milan are not setting themselves any limits after beating Bayern Munich to advance to the Champions League semifinals.

arts.ttl: Inter use grit to reach Champions League semis, but they must be better vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Inter qualified for the UEFA Champions League semifinals, but can they improve to eliminate a tough Barcelona side and make it to the final?

arts.ttl: “Everyone wastes time when winning” — Bayern Munich’s Josip Stanisic talks pushing Inter Milan ball boy
arts.sum: Bayern Munich gave everything they had but lost out on aggregate to Inter Milan, bringing an end to theirs and Thomas Müller’s European journey. Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich 2-2 draw with Inter Milan in the Champions League that saw the Bavarians eliminated from the competition on an aggregate score of 4-3?

arts.ttl: Kompany: Injuries were 'big issue' in Bayern exit
arts.sum: Bayern Munich earned a draw at the San Siro against Inter Milan on Wednesday but ultimately bowed out of the Champions League, leaving manager Vincent Kompany to reflect on the injury crisis that hit his side ahead of the quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Four observations from Bayern Munich’s 2-2 (4-3) aggregate loss to Inter Milan
arts.sum: A disorganized performance saw Bayern bow out of the Champions League again. Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich 2-2 draw with Inter Milan in the Champions League that saw the Bavarians eliminated from the competition on an aggregate score of 4-3?

arts.ttl: Match Awards from Bayern Munich’s miserable loss to Inter Milan inthe Champions League
arts.sum: But although Inter Milan gave them a tough time tonight, Bayern can be proud of their performance and can leave with their heads held high. The Argentinian international had an incredible game, scoring the goal that equalized in the early stages of the second half, almost immediately after Harry Kane scored for Bayern.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: Inter Milan 2-2 Bayern Munich; Inter advances 4-3 on aggregate (Champions League)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich traveled to San Siro to face off with Inter Milan in the Champions League for a match that was going to determine how many fans would feel about this season. Let’s dive into this one on the Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show:
